case_title: KATAYOON ASKARI VS. SELESTE DANYEALE MILLER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF KATAYOON ASKAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SELESTE DANYEALE MILLER IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED DEC-18-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, SELESTE DANYEALE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASKARI, KATAYOON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, SELESTE DANYEALE $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ASKARI, KATAYOON AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, SELESTE DANYEALE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
